overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a brown leather coat walking through deep snow on a mountainous winter slope. The scene transitions from a forested area with clear overcast skies to heavy fog and snowfall as the character ascends, with visibility gradually reducing throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain slope with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through deep snow, leaving footprints behind

entered.detail: deep snow covering the mountain slope with visible footprints
tall snow-covered pine tree on the left side of the path
tall snow-covered pine tree on the right side
distant mountain ridge visible on the left horizon
small wooden structure partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy mountain landscape with moderate tree coverage. A small wooden shed appears on the right side around the 12-second mark. The visibility is good with overcast skies, and the character leaves deep footprints in the snow while ascending the slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field on mountain slope with distant views

events.description: character passes close to pine tree branches on the left, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk uphill through open snow terrain, moving away from the tree line

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a more open area of the mountain, passing close to a pine tree on the left at the segment start. The wooden shed and right-side trees fall behind as the terrain opens up to reveal distant mountain ranges ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain slope with heavy snowfall and reduced visibility

events.description: weather changes to heavy fog with visible snowfall, significantly reducing visibility of distant terrain

agents.ego_description: trudging uphill through deeper snow as visibility decreases due to heavy fog and falling snow

entered.detail: thick white fog bank obscuring the distant mountains and valley
visible snow particles falling through the air

segments.scene_description: The weather deteriorates significantly as heavy fog and snowfall set in around the 35-second mark. Visibility drops substantially, obscuring the distant mountains that were previously visible. The character continues ascending through the snowy landscape with pine trees visible on both sides through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a snowy mountain slope that transforms from a clear, overcast landscape into a blinding whiteout. It begins with the character trekking through moderate tree coverage, passing a small wooden shed on the right while leaving deep footprints in the fresh snow. As the character moves forward, the terrain opens up and the trees recede, revealing a wide vista of distant mountain ranges under a gray sky. The scene then shifts as heavy fog and snowfall suddenly set in, rapidly obscuring the horizon and swallowing the distant peaks in a thick mist. Finally, the visibility drops substantially, leaving only the silhouettes of nearby pine trees visible as the character continues their climb into the storm.
